slides.title: Background Tasks
slides.subtitle: Background Threads + Notifications
slides.motto: Run slow operations in the background; the agent keeps thinking ahead

slides.title: The Problem: Background Tasks
slides.problem: Some commands take minutes: `npm install`, `pytest`, `docker build`. With a blocking loop, the model sits idle waiting. If the user asks "install dependencies and while that runs, create the config file," the agent does them sequentially, not in parallel.

slides.title: The Solution: BackgroundManager + notification queue
slides.solution:
```
Main thread                Background thread
+-----------------+        +-----------------+
| agent loop      |        | subprocess runs |
| ...             |        | ...             |
| [LLM call] <---+------- | enqueue(result) |
|  ^drain queue   |        +-----------------+
+-----------------+

Timeline:
Agent --[spawn A]--[spawn B]--[other work]----
             |          |
             v          v
          [A runs]   [B runs]      (parallel)
             |          |
             +-- results injected before next LLM call --+
```
principles: Run slow operations in the background; the agent keeps thinking ahead

slides.title: Key Takeaways
takeaways: Run slow operations in the background; the agent keeps thinking ahead

slides.title: Coming Up Next
preview: When one agent can't finish, delegate to persistent teammates via async mailboxes
